title.ko: 기계 또는 구조물의 정적 또는 동적 평형시험; 달리 분류되지 않는 구조물 또는 장치의 시험
title.en: TESTING STATIC OR DYNAMIC BALANCE OF MACHINES OR STRUCTURES; TESTING OF STRUCTURES OR APPARATUS, NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR

definition.ko: 기계 또는 구조물의 정적 또는 동적 평형 시험 G01M1/00 기밀성의 조사; 탄성의 조사 G01M3/00; G01M5/00 진동 또는 충격시험 G01M7/00 특수한 응용 공기역학적 시험; 수력학적 시험 G01M9/00; G01M10/00 광학적 시험 G01M11/00 기계적 또는 엔진의 시험 G01M13/00, G01M15/00, G01M17/00 이 서브클래스의 다른 그룹에 분류되지 않는 주제사항 G01M99/00

title.ko: 기계 또는 구조물의 정적 또는 동적 평형 시험
title.en: Testing static or dynamic balance of machines or structures
Details of balancing machines or devices
Adaptation of bearing support assemblies for receiving the body to be tested
Adaptation of drive assemblies for receiving the body to be tested
Instruments for indicating directly the magnitude and phase of the imbalance
Determining the moment of inertia

title.ko: 정적 균형; 무게중심의 위치측정(불평형의 측정에 의한 것 G01M1/14)
title.en: Static balancing; Determining position of centre of gravity (by determining imbalance G01M0001140000)
Determining imbalance (G01M0001300000, G01M0001380000 take precedence)
by oscillating or rotating the body to be tested
and running the body down from a speed greater than normal
and applying external forces compensating forces due to imbalance
and converting vibrations due to imbalance into electric variables
Performing balancing on elastic shafts, e.g. for crankshafts
with special adaptations for marking, e.g. by drilling
with special adaptations for determining imbalance of the body in situ, e.g. of vehicle wheels
Compensating imbalance (G01M0001380000 takes precedence)
by adding material to the body to be tested, e.g. by correcting-weights
by removing material from the body to be tested, e.g. from the tread of tyres
by adjusting position of masses built-in the body to be tested
Combined machines or devices for both determining and correcting imbalance
Investigating fluid tightness of structures
by using fluid or vacuum

title.ko: 누설점에서의 유체의 존재를 검출함에 의하는 것
title.en: by detecting the presence of fluid at the leakage point
by observing bubbles in a liquid pool
for pipes, cables, or tubes; for pipe joints or seals; for valves
for containers, e.g. radiators
by observing elastic covers or coatings, e.g. soapy water
for pipes, cables, or tubes; for pipe joints or seals; for valves

title.ko: 전기적 검출수단을 사용하는 것(G01M 3/06, G01M 3/12, G01M 3/20, G01M 3/24, G01M 3/26이 우선)
title.en: using electric detection means (G01M0003060000, G01M0003120000, G01M0003200000, G01M0003240000, G01M0003260000 take precedence)
for pipes, cables, or tubes; for pipe joints or seals; for valves
using special tracer materials, e.g. dye, fluorescent material, radioactive material
for pipes, cables, or tubes; for pipe joints or seals; for valves
using infrasonic, sonic or ultrasonic vibrations
by measuring rate of loss or gain of fluid, e.g. by pressure-responsive devices, by flow detectors
for pipes, cables, or tubes; for pipe joints or seals; for valves
using progressive displacement of one fluid by another
for containers, e.g. radiators
by testing the possibility of maintaining the vacuum in containers, e.g. in can-testing machines
by detecting change in dimensions of the structure being tested
by using light (G01M0003020000 takes precedence)
by using electric means, e.g. by observing electric discharges

title.ko: 구조물의 탄성조사, 예. 교량, 항공기 날개의 휘어짐 조사(G01M 9/00 우선)
title.en: Investigating the elasticity of structures, e.g. deflection of bridges or aircraft wings (G01M0009000000 takes precedence)
Vibration-testing of structures; Shock-testing of structures (G01M0009000000 takes precedence)
Vibration-testing
Monodirectional test stands
Multidirectional test stands
Shock-testing
Aerodynamic testing; Arrangements in or on wind tunnels
Wind tunnels
Details
Measuring arrangements specially adapted for aerodynamic testing
Aerodynamic models
Hydrodynamic testing; Arrangements in or on ship-testing tanks or water tunnels
Testing of optical apparatus; Testing structures by optical methods not otherwise provided for
Testing optical properties
Optical benches therefor
Testing the alignment of vehicle headlight devices
Testing mechanical properties
Testing of machine parts

title.ko: 기계 밸브 (유체 기밀을 위한 밸브의 시험 G01M3/00)
title.en: Machine valves (testing valves for fluid tightness G01M0003000000)
Sealing rings
Gearings; Transmission mechanisms
Gearings
Power-transmitting couplings or clutches
Power-transmitting endless elements, e.g. belts or chains
Test-benches with rotational drive means and loading means; Load or drive simulation
Test-benches of the mechanical closed-loop type, i.e. having a gear system constituting a closed-loop in combination with the object under test
Test-benches with force-applying means, e.g. loading of drive shafts along several directions
Acoustic or vibration analysis
Bearings
Acoustic or vibration analysis
Testing of engines
Details or accessories of testing apparatus
Testing internal-combustion engines
by combined monitoring of two or more different engine parameters
by monitoring positions of pistons or cranks
by monitoring pressure in cylinders
by monitoring pressure in fluid ducts, e.g. in lubrication or cooling parts
by monitoring exhaust gases
by detecting misfire
by monitoring vibrations
Testing gas-turbine engines or jet-propulsion engines

title.ko: 차량의 시험(기밀성 시험 G01M 3/00; 보디 또는 섀시의 탄성특성의 시험, 예. 비틀림 시험 G01M 5/00; 차량의 전조등 장치의 중심점 맞추기 시험 G01M 11/06; 엔진의 시험 G01M 15/00)
title.en: Testing of vehicles (testing fluid tightness G01M0003000000; testing elastic properties of bodies or chassis, e.g. torsion-testing, G01M0005000000; testing alignment of vehicle headlight devices G01M0011060000; testing of engines G01M0015000000)

title.ko: 바퀴달린 차량 또는 무한궤도 차량(G01M 17/08이 우선)
title.en: Wheeled or endless-tracked vehicles (G01M0017080000 takes precedence)
Wheels
Tyres
Endless-tracks
Suspension or damping
Steering behaviour; Rolling behaviour
Railway vehicles
Suspensions, axles or wheels
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
